title: A new $H_0$ measurement with SNe Requiem and Encore using Gravity.jl
comment: 11 pages, 9 figures (Submitted to A&A)
summary: We present a strong-lensing (SL) analysis of the galaxy cluster MACS J0138.0-2155 (z=0.336), the first known lens cluster discovered to host two distinct multiply imaged Type Ia supernovae (SNe): SN Requiem and SN Encore. Both transients are located in the massive, multiply imaged red galaxy MRG-M0138 at z=1.949. The projected total mass of this cluster has been investigated with several independent lens models (Suyu+26; Pierel+26), using a sample of 23 spectroscopically confirmed multiple images from 8 background sources (0.767<z<3.420), identified from the HST and the JWST imaging data, and VLT/MUSE spectroscopy. In this work, we develop a new SL model based on a novel Bayesian parametric lens-modelling framework Gravity.jl, exploiting the same SL dataset. Our reference mass model accurately reproduces the observed image positions, with an image-plane rms image position residual of 0.24''. Assuming H0 = 70 km/s/Mpc, we predict the future reappearances of highly delayed SNe counter-images, finding Dt(1d,1a) = 3177_{-59}^{+78} d (May-September, 2032) for SN Encore and Dt(2d,2a) = 3938_{-77}^{+90} d (February-July, 2027) for SN Requiem. By allowing H0 to vary, and using the measured time delays of both SN Encore and SN Requiem together with their statistical uncertainties as observables, we infer the value of H0 jointly with the other lens-model free parameters. From this analysis, we obtain a new measurement of H0 = 67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc, consistent with the value inferred from the aforementioned independent lens models. This error is currently dominated by the large relative uncertainty on the measured time delays (>10%). The forthcoming reappearance of SN Requiem offers an immediate opportunity to significantly improve constraints on H0, provided that lens-model systematics are controlled. These results establish M0138 as a premier anchor for high-precision cluster-scale TDC.

AI.tldr: 本文利用新开发的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架Gravity.jl，对星系团MACS J0138.0-2155进行强透镜分析，基于该团簇中两个多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的观测数据，预测了它们未来的重现时间，并联合时间延迟测量约束哈勃常数H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc。
AI.motivation: 星系团MACS J0138.0-2155是首个被发现宿主两个不同多像Ia型超新星（SN Requiem和SN Encore）的透镜团簇，这为利用时间延迟宇宙学（TDC）精确测量哈勃常数提供了独特机遇。此前已有若干独立透镜模型，但本研究旨在通过新的建模框架进一步提高精度并预测未来超新星重现事件。
AI.method: 基于Gravity.jl这一新颖的贝叶斯参数透镜建模框架，利用23个光谱确认的多重像（来自8个背景源，红移范围0.767<z<3.420）构建参考质量模型，该模型在图像平面上的均方根位置残差为0.24角秒。结合SN Encore和SN Requiem的实测时间延迟及其统计不确定性，联合推断H0及其他透镜模型自由参数。
AI.result: 参考模型精确再现观测图像位置。预测SN Encore将在2032年5-9月重现（延迟3177天），SN Requiem将在2027年2-7月重现（延迟3938天）。得到H0=67.0_{-7.8}^{+9.3} km/s/Mpc，与先前独立透镜模型结果一致，当前误差主要受时间延迟测量相对不确定性（>10%）支配。
AI.conclusion: M0138被确立为高精度星系团尺度时间延迟宇宙学的优先锚点。SN Requiem即将于2027年重现，为显著改进H0约束提供了直接机遇，前提是控制透镜模型系统误差。

Points are colour-coded by the average spectral signal-to-noise ratio reported by Granata et al. ( 2025 ) . figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the best-fit SL models for M0138. 4 4 4 Summary of the SL models and their overall performance. The columns report the model name, the number of free parameters explicitly varied in the lens model, \(N_{par}\) , the number of observational constraints, \(N_{const}\) , the number of degrees of freedom, d.o.f., the minimum total chi-square value, \(\chi^{2}_{{min,\,tot}}=\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}\) , the positional contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,pos}}^{2}\) , the time-delay contribution to the total chi-square, \(\chi_{{min,\,td}}^{2}=\chi_{{min,\,td\,(E)}}^{2}+\chi_{{min,\,td\,(R)}}^{2}\) (where the two terms denote the contributions from SN Encore and SN Requiem, respectively), the minimum chi-square value per degree-of-freedom \(\tilde{\chi}^{2}_{{min}}\) , the \(\Delta_{{rms}}\) value, and the mean Gelman–Rubin convergence statistic, \(\langle\hat{R}\rangle\) , of the MCMC chains. The number of degrees of freedom is computed as \({d.o.f.}=N_{const}-N_{par}-2N_{src}\) , where \(N_{src}=8\) is the number of independent source families, each contributing two source-plane coordinates that are marginalised over as nuisance parameters.

The two insets on the right show the normalised residuals, clipped to the range \([-20\,\sigma,+20\,\sigma]\) , for the two regions highlighted by the dashed blue boxes in the model-prediction panel. Residuals associated with host-galaxy images 3d and 3e are omitted because of the contamination from the BCG. Red circles mark the observed multiple images of MRG-M0138 (left panel), listed in Table 4 in Ertl et al. ( 2025 ) , while the red boxes in the right panel correspond to the predicted positions. The blue cross in the right panel shows the predicted position of the host galaxy in the source plane. Horizontal error bars indicate the corresponding \(68\%\) credible intervals. For our model, the interval is derived from \(1000\) posterior samples randomly drawn from the H0_fixed MCMC chains.

title: A Strongly Lensed Ultra-faint Arc at $z \approx 10$ with an F200W excess in Abell S1063
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, 1 table
summary: Strong gravitational lensing provides a powerful route to probing intrinsically faint galaxies during the first few hundred million years of cosmic history. In this Letter, we report the identification of GAR10, a highly magnified F115W-dropout galaxy at $z\approx10$ in the Abell S1063 cluster field, using deep JWST/NIRCam imaging from the GLIMPSE and GO-1840 programs. The source shows an unusually blue ultraviolet (UV) continuum and a significant F200W excess relative to adjacent bands. Under our high-magnification lensing solution, we infer a median magnification of $μ=43^{+78}_{-20}$, corresponding to an intrinsic UV magnitude of $M_{\rm UV}\approx-15.8$. We use exploratory Prospector SED modeling to examine two physically motivated interpretations of the observed photometry. In Case I, GAR10 is described by an extremely metal-poor, continuum-dominated stellar population at $z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}$, with a blue UV slope of $β=-2.92\pm0.12$ and a low metallicity of $\log(Z/Z_\odot)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}$, consistent with an extremely metal-poor or Pop III-like continuum-dominated interpretation under the adopted priors. In Case II, GAR10 is interpreted as an extremely young (1--3 Myr), high-ionization galaxy at $z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}$, in which the F200W excess is produced by intense rest-frame UV emission lines, including CIV, HeII, and CIII]. Both cases can partially reproduce the current photometry within the adopted priors, but they imply distinct ionizing sources, enrichment histories, and possible contributions to cosmic reionization. GAR10 therefore represents a rare laboratory for studying ultra-faint galaxy formation at cosmic dawn. Future JWST/NIRSpec spectroscopy will be essential to distinguishing between the steep continuum and emission-line origins of the F200W excess.

AI.tldr: 本文利用JWST/NIRCam数据在Abell S1063星系团场中发现了一个红移z≈10的强引力透镜星系GAR10，其具有异常蓝的紫外连续谱和显著的F200W波段过剩。研究提出了两种物理解释：极端贫金属、连续谱主导的星族（Case I）或极年轻、高电离的星系（Case II）。GAR10为研究宇宙黎明时期的超暗星系形成提供了难得的实验室。
AI.motivation: 强引力透镜为探测宇宙早期（最初几亿年）的暗弱星系提供了独特途径，而目前对这一时期极暗星系的认识还非常有限。
AI.method: 利用JWST/NIRCam深度成像数据（GLIMPSE和GO-1840项目），结合高放大率引力透镜模型（中值放大率μ=43^{+78}_{-20}），以及Prospector SED建模分析观测到的多波段测光数据。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜为探测宇宙最初几亿年期间本质暗淡的星系提供了强大途径。在本快报中，我们报告了在Abell S1063星系团场中，利用GLIMPSE和GO-1840项目的深JWST/NIRCam成像，识别出一个高度放大的F115W-dropout星系GAR10，其红移约为10。该源显示出异常蓝的紫外连续谱，以及相对于相邻波段的显著F200W过剩。根据我们的高放大率透镜解，我们推断中位放大率为μ=43^{+78}_{-20}，对应的内禀紫外星等为M_UV≈-15.8。我们使用探索性Prospector SED建模来检验观测测光数据的两种物理解释。在情形I中，GAR10被描述为一个在z=10.75_{-0.34}^{+0.41}处的极端贫金属、连续谱主导的星族，具有蓝的紫外斜率β=-2.92±0.12和低金属丰度log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}，这与在采用先验下极端贫金属或类Pop III连续谱主导的解释一致。在情形II中，GAR10被解释为一个在z=10.45_{-0.21}^{+0.11}处的极端年轻（1-3 Myr）、高电离星系，其中F200W过剩由强烈的静止系紫外发射线产生，包括CIV、HeII和CIII]。两种情形都能在采用先验下部分重现当前测光数据，但它们暗示了不同的电离源、增丰历史以及对宇宙再电离的可能贡献。因此，GAR10代表了研究宇宙黎明时期超暗星系形成的稀有实验室。未来的JWST/NIRSpec光谱对于区分F200W过剩的陡峭连续谱起源和发射线起源至关重要。

All physical quantities quoted for this panel are measured from this best-fit model spectrum rather than from the marginalized posterior medians. We therefore interpret this solution as an illustrative limiting case in which the F200W flux is dominated primarily by an ultra-blue stellar continuum, with negligible nebular-line contribution. Right panel (Case II): A lower-redshift, line-driven solution. The red curve shows the representative best-fit realization at \(z_{best}\approx 10.52\) . This solution corresponds to an extremely young burst age of \(1\) – \(3\) Myr in the adopted Case II model setup. The apparent inverted Balmer break feature is therefore naturally associated with a very young, high-ionization stellar population with strong nebular emission. figures.caption_zh: 图3：在两种探索性极限情景下，GAR10分量ab的最佳拟合Prospector SED建模。左面板（情形I）：连续谱主导的极端贫金属解。红线显示了在z_best≈11.33处的代表性最佳拟合实现。该面板中引用的所有物理量均来自该最佳拟合模型谱，而非来自边缘化后验中位数。对最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到异常蓝的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-3.15，而最佳拟合恒星金属丰度达到[log_{10}(Z/Z_⊙)]_best≈-4.9。这些最佳拟合值与表1中报告的边缘化后验中位数（z=10.75^{+0.41}_{-0.34}，β=-2.92±0.12，log(Z/Z_⊙)=-3.56_{-0.85}^{+0.65}）不同，因为情形I的后验是非高斯的，并延伸到所采用的贫金属、无尘埃参数空间的边缘。因此，我们将此解解释为一个说明性极限情形，其中F200W流量主要来自超蓝恒星连续谱，而星云线贡献可忽略。右面板（情形II）：较低红移、线驱动的解。红线显示了在z_best≈10.52处的代表性最佳拟合实现。与左面板一样，所有引用的量均来自最佳拟合模型谱。对该最佳拟合谱进行无发射线幂律拟合，得到更适中的紫外连续谱斜率β_best=-2.58。此解对应于所采用情形II模型设置中极端年轻的爆发年龄1–3 Myr。因此，明显的倒巴尔默断裂特征自然地与具有强星云发射的非常年轻、高电离星族相关联。在此情景中，F200W过剩由强的静止系紫外星云发射重现，主要是He II λ1640和C III] λ1908。

title: LEGGOS II: A Strong Lens Model and Source-Plane Projection of the Clumpy Star-Forming Galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.48
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures. Submitted to ApJ on May 5, currently under review
summary: Strong gravitational lensing by galaxy clusters combined with the resolution of JWST enables studies of star formation on ~10-100 pc scales in galaxies at z~2-4. As part of the LEnsing and Galaxy Growth: Observing Substructures survey (LEGGOS), we present an updated strong lensing model of the galaxy cluster SDSSJ1110+6459 (z=0.659), which lenses the clumpy star-forming galaxy SGASJ111020.0+645950.8 at z=2.481 into a highly magnified giant arc. Using JWST NIRCam imaging, NIRSpec spectroscopy, and archival HST data, we confirm and refine the identification of four multiply imaged background sources, including one newly identified system, and map over 20 luminous regions between each image of the primary arc. Spectroscopy confirms that several previously ambiguous edge "clumps" belong to the main arc at z=2.481. Despite the limited number of strongly lensed sources in the field, the resulting lens model has high precision, owing to the high density of JWST-resolved clump constraints that tightly probe the lensing potential near the giant arc. The model yields a projected lens mass of $M(<250~\mathrm{kpc}) = 1.21^{+0.09}_{-0.04} \times 10^{14}~M_\odot$, an Einstein radius of $θ_\mathrm{E} = 10.8^{+0.3}_{-0.4}~\mathrm{arcsec}$, and a total effective magnification of $μ_\mathrm{tot}=24.2^{+3.4}_{-1.2}$ for the giant arc. Across the arc, individual clump magnifications span $μ_\mathrm{clump}\sim4-19$, with fractional magnification uncertainties of $σ_μ/|μ_{\rm best}|\sim0.03-0.09$. We report a $\sim2-8\times$ improvement in magnification precision over previous models. Ongoing and future analyses of this arc will enable robust measurements of star-forming structure, building on the lensing foundation established here for LEGGOS studies of galaxy growth and feedback during cosmic noon.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST的高分辨率数据和星系团SDSSJ1110+6459的强引力透镜效应，本研究构建了高精度透镜模型，实现了对红移z=2.481的恒星形成星系在~10-100 pc尺度上的研究，显著提升了放大率精度（2-8倍），为研究宇宙正午时期的星系增长和反馈奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: 传统观测难以解析高红移星系中的恒星形成结构，而强引力透镜与JWST高分辨率相结合，可以突破这一限制，实现对z~2-4星系在10-100 pc尺度上的研究。
AI.method: 利用JWST NIRCam成像、NIRSpec光谱以及HST存档数据，更新了星系团SDSSJ1110+6459的强引力透镜模型；确认了四个多重成像背景源（包括一个新系统），并利用大量JWST解析的团块作为约束条件。
AI.result: 透镜模型精度高：投影质量1.21×10¹⁴ M☉，爱因斯坦半径10.8角秒，巨弧总放大率24.2；单个团块放大率4-19，放大率不确定度仅0.03-0.09；相比先前模型精度提升约2-8倍。
AI.conclusion: 该高精度透镜模型为LEGGOS项目后续研究宇宙正午时期的星系增长和反馈提供了坚实基础，将实现对恒星形成结构的可靠测量。

title: NOEMA$^\rm{3D}$: A deep view of cold gas flows in a barred spiral galaxy at $z\sim1$
comment: 32 pages, 30 figures, submitted to A&A
summary: We present a deep, high-resolution CO(4-3) IRAM-NOEMA observation of a main sequence, barred, spiral galaxy at $z\approx1.12$, with an on-source integration time of $\approx37$ hours and a beam FWHM of $\approx0.\!\!^{\prime\prime}3$. We use the molecular gas data in conjunction with the available deep multi-band JWST and HST imaging, covering restframe UV to near-IR wavelengths, to quantitatively study the gas flows in the disk plane of this cosmic noon barred spiral. We find that this target is a massive ($\log(M_{\rm{baryons}}/M_\odot)\approx10.96$), baryon-dominated ($f_{\rm{dm}}(<R_e)=u^2_{\rm{circ,dm}}(R_e)/u^2_{\rm{circ}}(R_e)\sim4\%$), gas-rich ($f_{\rm{gas}}=M_{\rm{gas}}/(M_{\rm{\star}}+M_{\rm{gas}})\approx40\%$) disk, hosting a long ($a_{\rm{bar}}\approx4.2$ kpc), strong ($Q_{\rm{b}}\approx0.37$), and fast ($\mathcal{R}=R_{\rm{CR}}/a_{\rm{bar}}\approx1.05$) bar, which rotates at an angular speed of $Ω_{\rm{pattern}}\approx$ 50 km/s/kpc. This bar is driving molecular gas inflows with a net inflow rate of $\dot{M}\sim30$ $M_\odot$/yr, based on three estimates, which is of the same order as the galaxy-integrated star formation rate ($\rm{SFR}\approx36$ $M_\odot$/yr). We additionally identify evidence of a well-defined dust lane shock at the northwestern side of the bar, with gas motions parallel to this feature, in agreement with expectations for an established bar-driven flow. Our study highlights the possible role of bars as key drivers of galaxy evolution for a significant fraction of cosmic noon galaxies, offering a detailed picture of well-defined, bar-driven inflows in a high-$z$ barred spiral.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了对一个位于$z\approx1.12$的主序棒旋星系的深度、高分辨率CO(4-3) IRAM-NOEMA观测，其源上积分时间约为37小时，波束半高全宽约为$0.\!\!^{\prime\prime}3$。我们结合分子气体数据与可用的深度多波段JWST和HST成像（覆盖静止框架紫外到近红外波长），定量研究了该宇宙正午棒旋星系盘面内的气体流动。我们发现该目标是一个大质量（$\log(M_{\rm{baryons}}/M_\odot)\approx10.96$）、重子主导（$f_{\rm{dm}}(<R_e)=u^2_{\rm{circ,dm}}(R_e)/u^2_{\rm{circ}}(R_e)\sim4\%$）、富含气体（$f_{\rm{gas}}=M_{\rm{gas}}/(M_{\rm{\star}}+M_{\rm{gas}})\approx40\%$）的盘，拥有一个长（$a_{\rm{bar}}\approx4.2$ kpc）、强（$Q_{\rm{b}}\approx0.37$）、快（$\mathcal{R}=R_{\rm{CR}}/a_{\rm{bar}}\approx1.05$）的棒，其角速度为$Ω_{\rm{pattern}}\approx$ 50 km/s/kpc。该棒驱动分子气体流入，基于三种估计的净流入率为$\dot{M}\sim30$ $M_\odot$/yr，与星系整体恒星形成率（$\rm{SFR}\approx36$ $M_\odot$/yr）处于同一量级。我们还识别出在棒的西北侧存在明确的尘埃带激波证据，气体运动平行于该特征，这与已建立的棒驱动流预期一致。我们的研究强调了棒作为宇宙正午时期大量星系演化关键驱动因素的可能作用，为高红移棒旋星系中清晰定义的棒驱动流入提供了详细图像。

title: Cooling, conduction, compact objects: Gravothermal evolution of dissipative self-interacting dark matter halos
comment: 19 pages, 16 figures, 2 tables; to be submitted to A&A
summary: Many proposed self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) models give rise to radiative processes that can dissipate energy. Understanding their impact on astrophysical objects through simulations and comparing the results with observations may thus constrain SIDM models. In this work, we systematically investigate how dissipation alters the gravothermal evolution of isolated SIDM halos by independently varying dissipation and heat conduction and identify potential observational signatures. To this end, we present the first extension of the $N$-body formalism for frequent small-angle self-interactions (fSIDM) to include effective dissipation. We compare all results for isolated halos with a dissipative gravothermal fluid model to assess its validity and limitations. We find that dissipation qualitatively changes the gravothermal evolution of SIDM halos beyond simply accelerating collapse. Sufficiently strong central cooling can invert the usual role of heat conduction: the formation of an isothermal core is suppressed such that conduction remains directed inward throughout the evolution. Outer halo regions beyond the scale radius can cool efficiently rather than being heated by conduction, resulting in a larger region of mass infall and a less pronounced indentation between the core and the outer halo in the final density profile. These effects depend strongly on the cooling rate but are comparatively insensitive to the angular dependence of the self-interaction cross section. We further show that weakly dissipative self-interactions can explain the properties of the recently observed strong lens perturber in JVAS~B1938+666 with significantly shorter evolution times or, equivalently, smaller cross sections compared to the elastic case. Our results open a new route to connecting halo structure and recently reported compact objects to dark-sector microphysics.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 许多提出的自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）模型会产生能够耗散能量的辐射过程。通过模拟理解它们对天体物理物体的影响，并将结果与观测进行比较，可以约束SIDM模型。在这项工作中，我们通过独立改变耗散和热传导，系统地研究了耗散如何改变孤立SIDM晕的引力热演化，并识别潜在的观测特征。为此，我们首次将用于频繁小角度自相互作用的N体形式扩展到包含有效耗散。我们将孤立晕的所有结果与耗散引力热流体模型进行比较，以评估其有效性和局限性。我们发现，耗散在定性上改变了SIDM晕的引力热演化，而不仅仅是加速坍缩。足够强的中心冷却可以逆转热传导的通常作用：等温核的形成被抑制，使得传导在整个演化过程中保持向内方向。尺度半径外的外部晕区可以有效地冷却，而不是被传导加热，导致更大的物质内落区域，并在最终密度剖面中核心与外部晕之间的凹陷不那么明显。这些效应强烈依赖于冷却速率，但对自相互作用截面的角度依赖性相对不敏感。我们进一步表明，弱耗散自相互作用可以解释最近在JVAS B1938+666中观测到的强透镜扰动体的性质，且与弹性情况相比，所需的演化时间或截面显著更短。我们的结果为连接晕结构和最近报道的致密天体与暗物质微观物理开辟了一条新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，弱耗散自相互作用可以解释强透镜扰动体观测，且所需演化时间或截面更小，为连接晕结构和致密天体与暗物质微观物理提供了新途径。

Both decelerate by \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{drag}}\) and experience opposite \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{rand}}\) in a random direction perpendicular to the relative velocity \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{ij}\) . Right: Zoom-in to the level of physical particles for a dissipative process like Eq. 6 . The physical particles undergo many such scatterings in a single numerical interaction. Therefore, the radiated momenta \(\boldsymbol{k}\) average out and the transverse momenta of the outgoing DM particles give rise to diffusion with vanishing drift in the CMS frame modeled by \(\Delta\boldsymbol{v}_{{rand}}\) . The radiated energy \(k^{0}\) accumulates and leads to an increased drag. For readability, the scattering angle and the magnitude of the radiated momentum \(\boldsymbol{k}\) are highly exaggerated.

title: First measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a lensed quasar with JWST/NIRSpec IFS
comment: 18 pages, 9 figures, submitted to Physical Review D
summary: Strong gravitational lensing is a powerful probe of dark matter (DM) structure on subgalactic scales: in particular, statistics of flux-ratio anomalies (discrepancies between mass model predictions and observed flux ratios) in quadruply imaged quasars are sensitive to perturbations by low-mass DM halos down to $\sim 10^6 M_\odot$. Studies leveraging these anomalies require high-quality flux-ratio measurements from an emission region insensitive to stellar microlensing. In this paper, we present the first measurement of narrow-line flux ratios for a gravitationally lensed quasar using JWST/NIRSpec with Integral Field Spectroscopy (IFS), targeting the well-studied system RXJ1131$-$1231. Flux ratios are extracted from the [S III] 9071/9533 $Å$ narrow-line doublet - the first use of this doublet for substructure studies - by performing a full lens model reconstruction to isolate the unresolved nuclear emission from extended narrow-line emission. The resulting spectra are jointly modeled using $\texttt{lensqso-specfit}$, a publicly available software package introduced in this work for the simultaneous spectral fitting of multiple lensed quasar images. We achieve $\sim$ 5% uncertainties on the flux ratios, comparable to the precision of JWST/MIRI warm dust measurements, and detect a clear anomaly in the cusp images relative to a standard smooth lens model. Our results are in good agreement with previous narrow-line measurements and broadly consistent with JWST/MIRI warm dust flux ratios, with marginal ($\sim 2-3σ$) deviations. We demonstrate how such shifts between differently sized emission regions may be enhanced by small ($\sim 10$ pc) spatial offsets. Our method is generalizable to other systems with existing or future IFS observations, and the combination of narrow-line and warm dust flux ratios offers a new avenue for improving DM constraints with flux-ratio anomaly statistics.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 强引力透镜是探测亚星系尺度暗物质（DM）结构的有力工具：特别是四重成像类星体中流量比异常（质量模型预测与观测流量比之间的差异）的统计对低质量暗物质晕（低至约10^6 M_⊙）的扰动敏感。利用这些异常的研究需要来自对恒星微透镜不敏感的发射区的高质量流量比测量。本文中，我们首次利用JWST/NIRSpec积分场光谱（IFS）测量了引力透镜类星体的窄线流量比，目标为研究充分的系统RXJ1131−1231。流量比从[S III] 9071/9533 Å窄线双线中提取——这是该双线首次用于子结构研究——通过执行完整的透镜模型重建以将未分辨的核发射与延展的窄线发射分离。所得光谱使用lensqso-specfit进行联合建模，这是一个在本工作中引入的公开可用软件包，用于多个透镜类星体图像的同时光谱拟合。我们实现了约5%的流量比不确定度，与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃测量的精度相当，并检测到相对于标准光滑透镜模型的尖点图像中的明显异常。我们的结果与之前的窄线测量高度一致，并与JWST/MIRI暖尘埃流量比大致相符，存在边际（约2-3σ）偏差。我们展示了这种不同大小发射区之间的偏移如何可能被小的（约10 pc）空间偏移增强。我们的方法可推广至其他具有或未来将有IFS观测的系统，窄线与暖尘埃流量比的组合为利用流量比异常统计改进暗物质约束提供了新途径。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该方法可推广至其他具有或未来将有IFS观测的系统，窄线与暖尘埃流量比的组合为利用流量比异常统计改进暗物质约束提供了新途径。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left panel: “White-light” image of RXJ1131 \(-\) 1231 from the JWST/NIRSpec datacube, summed over the entire wavelength range. The four quasar images (A, B, C, and D) are labeled following the convention from previous studies of the same system (Sluse et al., 2007 ; Sugai et al., 2007 ; Keeley et al., 2025 ; Gilman et al., 2025 ; Shajib et al., 2026 ) , for direct comparison of the flux ratios. The main deflector and its nearby satellite are marked with G and S, respectively. In blue, we show a circular aperture of radius \(0\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}4\) (8 pixels) around image C. Right panel: Spectrum integrated over that aperture, with lines identified using the AGN spectral atlas from Vanden Berk et al. ( 2001 ) for the rest-frame optical, and Riffel et al. ( 2006 ) for the rest-frame near-infrared (NIR).
figures.caption_zh: 图1：左图：JWST/NIRSpec数据立方体上RXJ1131 \(-\) 1231的“白光”图像，叠加了整个波长范围。四个类星体图像（A、B、C和D）按照同一系统先前研究的惯例（Sluse等人，2007；Sugai等人，2007；Keeley等人，2025；Gilman等人，2025；Shajib等人，2026）进行标记，以便直接比较流量比。主偏转器及其附近的卫星分别用G和S标记。蓝色显示图像C周围半径为\(0\aas@@fstack{\prime\prime}4\)（8像素）的圆形孔径。右图：该孔径上积分的光谱，使用Vanden Berk等人（2001）的AGN光谱图谱识别静止光学波段谱线，以及Riffel等人（2006）的静止近红外（NIR）图谱识别谱线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Image model for the PSF reconstruction step. Top row: (Left) White-light image summed over the \(9320-9420\ ${\text{Å}}$\) wavelength range (in green in Figure 1 ). The dashed black circles show the location of a faint, compact light source, quadruply imaged but offset from the quasar images, that was explicitly included in the source light model (see Section 3.1.2 ). (Middle) Reconstructed light under the best-fit lens model. (Right) Residuals, normalized by the estimated noise map. Bottom row, from left to right: initial PSF estimate in that range generated with stpsf , output of the PSF reconstruction process, and map of total per-pixel uncertainties on the final PSF model (see Appendix B ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：用于PSF重建步骤的图像模型。顶行：（左）在\(9320-9420\ ${\text{Å}}$\)波长范围（图1中绿色）上求和的白光图像。虚线黑色圆圈显示一个微弱、致密的光源的位置，该光源被四重成像但偏离类星体图像，已明确包含在源光模型中（见第3.1.2节）。（中）最佳拟合透镜模型下的重建光。（右）残差，按估计噪声图归一化。底行，从左到右：使用stpsf生成的该范围内的初始PSF估计，PSF重建过程的输出，以及最终PSF模型上每个像素总不确定度的图（见附录B）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Image model for the detailed lens modeling step. Top row, from left to right: white-light image summed over the \(8900-9650\ ${\text{Å}}$\) wavelength range (in gray in Figure 1 ), reconstructed light under the best-fit lens model, and normalized residuals. Bottom row, from left to right: unitless convergence profile \(\kappa\) (i.e., dimensionless projected surface mass density), corresponding model for the magnification \(\mu=\det(\mathbf{A}^{-1})\) (where \(\mathbf{A}\) is the lensing Jacobian), and fraction of unresolved quasar light compared to the total lensed light (extended emission + point-source flux).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：用于详细透镜建模步骤的图像模型。顶行，从左到右：在\(8900-9650\ ${\text{Å}}$\)波长范围（图1中灰色）上求和的白光图像，最佳拟合透镜模型下的重建光，以及归一化残差。底行，从左到右：无量纲会聚度分布\(\kappa\)（即无量纲投影面质量密度），对应的放大率模型\(\mu=\det(\mathbf{A}^{-1})\)（其中\(\mathbf{A}\)是透镜雅可比矩阵），以及未分辨类星体光相对于总透镜光（延展发射+点源流量）的比例。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Best-fit joint model for the four extracted quasar spectra at images A, B, C, and D. The observed data points are shown in black, with errorbars representing the estimated \(\pm 1\sigma\) uncertainties, forwarding the PSF and lens modeling uncertainties. Each spectral feature used in the model is displayed separately, with the total model flux in red. The absolute residuals are shown at the bottom of each panel.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：图像A、B、C和D处四个提取的类星体光谱的最佳拟合联合模型。观测数据点以黑色显示，误差棒表示估计的\(\pm 1\sigma\)不确定度，传递了PSF和透镜建模的不确定度。模型中使用的每个光谱特征分别显示，总模型流量以红色显示。每个面板底部显示绝对残差。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of the spectral features used for the best-fit model of the quasar spectra in the \(8900-9650\ ${\text{Å}}$\) range. The values for the rest-frame vacuum wavelength \(\lambda_{vac}\) of each emission line are taken from the NIST database (Kramida et al., 2024 ) . For the conventions used for the Gauss-Hermite series, see Appendix C.2.1 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：用于\(8900-9650\ ${\text{Å}}$\)范围内类星体光谱最佳拟合模型的光谱特征总结。每条发射线的静止真空波长\(\lambda_{vac}\)值取自NIST数据库（Kramida等人，2024）。关于高斯-埃尔米特级数的约定，见附录C.2.1。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Measured flux ratios and astrometric offsets between the point-like quasar images. By convention, we compare Image 1 relative to Image 2 (i.e., we report \(\vec{x}_{1}-\vec{x}_{2}\) and \(f_{1}/f_{2}\) ). The flux-ratio uncertainties are estimated by MCMC exploration of the posterior for the joint spectral model. We separate the values between the 3 cusp images (A, B, and C), which are particularly relevant for dark substructure inference, and those involving the counterimage (D).
figures.caption_zh: 表2：点状类星体图像之间的测量流量比和天体测量偏移。按惯例，我们比较图像1相对于图像2（即报告\(\vec{x}_{1}-\vec{x}_{2}\)和\(f_{1}/f_{2}\)）。流量比不确定度通过联合光谱模型后验的MCMC探索估计。我们将3个尖点图像（A、B和C）的值与涉及反像（D）的值分开，前者对暗子结构推断特别相关。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Comparison between the flux ratios measured in this work (for the narrow [ S iii ] doublet, the broad Pa \(\varepsilon\) line, and the continuum over the \(8900-9650${\text{Å}}$\) range), the magnification ratios predicted by the lens model predicted in Section 3.1.2 (displayed as filled bands representing 95% credible intervals), and some flux-ratio values found in the literature. The narrow [ O iii ] doublet measurements are taken from Sluse et al. ( 2007 ) , and the hot/warm dust measurements from Keeley et al. ( 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：本工作测量的流量比（针对窄[S III]双线、宽Pa \(\varepsilon\)谱线和\(8900-9650${\text{Å}}$\)范围内的连续谱）、第3.1.2节预测的透镜模型放大率比（显示为填充带，代表95%置信区间）以及文献中发现的一些流量比值之间的比较。窄[O III]双线测量取自Sluse等人（2007），热/暖尘埃测量取自Keeley等人（2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Relative magnification \(\mu_{NLR}/\mu_{wd}\) between the NLR and the warm dust, as a function of the offset of both emission regions relative to the center of a perturbing NFW halo. We assume Gaussian light distribution for the profiles of both regions, with a FHWM of 5 pc for the warm dust (Keeley et al., 2025 ) . In order to illustrate the impact of the other parameters, we vary the FHWM of the NLR (20 pc or 50 pc, Müller-Sánchez et al., 2011 ) , the perturbing halo mass ( \(M=10^{8}M_{\odot}\) or \(M=10^{9}M_{\odot}\) ) on each column, and the perturbing halo concentration ( \(c/c_{DJ19}=1\) or 3, where \(c_{DJ19}(M,z_{l})\) is the concentration-mass relation from Diemer & Joyce ( 2019 ) ) between the top and bottom rows (note the change in scale for the colormap). The dashed black line indicates concentric emission regions (i.e., the two are equally offset from the NFW halo). The dotted and solid gray lines are isocontours at \(\mu_{NLR}/\mu_{wd}=1.1\) and 1.2, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：NLR与暖尘埃之间的相对放大率\(\mu_{NLR}/\mu_{wd}\)，作为两个发射区相对于扰动NFW晕中心的偏移的函数。我们假设两个区域的光分布为高斯分布，暖尘埃的半高全宽为5 pc（Keeley等人，2025）。为了说明其他参数的影响，我们在每一列上变化NLR的半高全宽（20 pc或50 pc，Müller-Sánchez等人，2011）、扰动晕质量（\(M=10^{8}M_{\odot}\)或\(M=10^{9}M_{\odot}\)），并在顶行和底行之间变化扰动晕浓度（\(c/c_{DJ19}=1\)或3，其中\(c_{DJ19}(M,z_{l})\)是来自Diemer & Joyce (2019)的浓度-质量关系）（注意色标尺度的变化）。虚线黑色表示同心发射区（即两者与NFW晕的偏移相等）。虚线和实线灰色线分别是\(\mu_{NLR}/\mu_{wd}=1.1\)和1.2的等值线。

title: Constraints on the Gas Geometry Surrounding Little Red Dots through Narrow-Line Diagnostics
comment: 14 pages, 5 figures, 1 table, submitted to ApJ
summary: Little Red Dots (LRDs) are a recently identified population of high-redshift sources, with a common interpretation being accreting black holes embedded within a spherical, optically thick gas envelope. Within this framework, some models propose that the continuum arises from the dense-gas envelope, where hard ionizing radiation from the central engine is reprocessed into a stellar-like photosphere with an effective temperature of $\sim$5000 K. This implies that both the UV continuum and narrow-line emission are then powered by the host galaxy rather than an exposed central engine. To test whether this is consistent with the observed narrow-line ratios, we analyze multiple line diagnostics for a sample of $\sim$20 LRDs with high signal-to-noise NIRSpec grating spectra. We find that at least 40\% of the LRDs have line ratios pointing toward high ionization parameter and electron temperature, with a further 15\% also falling in the AGN regime for the O\textsc{i}/H$α$ diagnostic, indicative of harder ionizing radiation. These line ratios are incompatible with stellar photoionization from a star-forming host alone. This suggests lower density channels within the gas envelope through which high energy photons can escape and excite the surrounding narrow-line emitting gas. At the same time, most LRDs lack strong high-ionization line emission, with He\,\textsc{ii}/H$β$ $\lesssim0.1$, consistent with an ionizing spectrum softer than that of a standard AGN. Together, these results disfavour a uniform gas envelope with a covering fraction of unity, and instead point to a more complex geometry that gives rise to anisotropic ionizing radiation.

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析约20个Little Red Dots（LRDs）的高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱，发现至少40%的LRDs具有高电离参数和电子温度的线比，15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域，表明其存在比恒星电离更硬的辐射源，因此不支持单一、全覆盖的气体包层模型，而指向更复杂的各向异性几何结构。
AI.motivation: 检验LRDs的窄线比是否与“连续谱来自密气体包层、UV连续谱和窄线发射由宿主星系而非暴露的中央引擎驱动”的模型一致。
AI.method: 对约20个LRDs的高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱进行多线诊断分析。
AI.result: 至少40%的LRDs线比指向高电离参数和电子温度；15%的LRDs在O I/Hα诊断中落入AGN区域；大多数LRDs缺乏强高电离线发射（He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1）。
AI.conclusion: 这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 小红点（LRDs）是最近发现的一类高红移源，通常被解释为嵌入在球形光学厚气体包层中的吸积黑洞。在此框架下，一些模型提出连续谱来自稠密气体包层，其中来自中心引擎的硬电离辐射被再处理成有效温度约为5000 K的类恒星光球。这意味着紫外连续谱和窄线发射均由宿主星系而非暴露的中心引擎提供能量。为了检验这是否与观测到的窄线比一致，我们分析了约20个具有高信噪比NIRSpec光栅光谱的LRD样本的多种线诊断。我们发现至少40%的LRD的线比指向高电离参数和电子温度，另有15%在O I/Hα诊断中也落入AGN区域，表明存在更硬的电离辐射。这些线比与仅来自恒星形成宿主的光电离不相容。这表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可通过这些通道逃逸并激发周围的窄线发射气体。同时，大多数LRD缺乏强的高电离线发射，He II/Hβ ≤ 0.1，这与比标准AGN更软的电离谱一致。综合来看，这些结果不支持覆盖因子为1的均匀气体包层，而是指向更复杂的几何结构，产生各向异性的电离辐射。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，结论如下：这些线比与恒星电离不相容，表明气体包层内存在低密度通道，高能光子可逃逸并激发周围窄线气体；不支持均匀全覆盖的气体包层，而指向更复杂的各向异性电离辐射几何结构。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: A few examples of the best-fit spectral model ordered by the signal-to-noise ratio of H \(\gamma\) , showing the regions around key emission lines used in our AGN diagnostic analysis (see § IV.1 ). The black line shows the best-fit model, with different colours denoting observed spectra with different dispersers.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：按H γ信噪比排序的最佳拟合光谱模型示例，显示了AGN诊断分析中使用的关键发射线周围区域（见§ IV.1）。黑线显示最佳拟合模型，不同颜色表示使用不同色散元件观测到的光谱。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: We show the location of LRDs in different narrow-line diagnostic diagrams. The solid markers show the line ratios with S/N greater than 3, while the open markers show line ratios with S/N greater than 2 but less than 3. The shaded regions show the star-forming locus as defined in the literature. We also show stellar photoionization grids based on cloudy modelling for different ionizing parameter ( \(\log U\in[-3,-1]\) ) and gas-phase metallicity ( \(Z\in[0.001,0.02]\) ).
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们展示了LRD在不同窄线诊断图中的位置。实心标记表示信噪比大于3的线比，空心标记表示信噪比大于2但小于3的线比。阴影区域显示文献中定义的恒星形成区。我们还展示了基于cloudy建模的不同电离参数（log U ∈ [-3, -1]）和气体相金属丰度（Z ∈ [0.001, 0.02]）的恒星光电离网格。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Summary of narrow-line diagnostics for the LRD sample. A checkmark (✓) indicates AGN-like line ratios and a cross (✗) indicates ratios consistent with star formation. A dash (–) indicates that the relevant lines were not detected at sufficient S/N (less than \(3\) ), and the ellipsis ( \(\cdots\) ) indicates that the line lies outside the wavelength coverage. a a footnotetext: Sources are classified as AGN if \(\log\) (He ii /H \(\beta\) ) \(>-1.22\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：LRD样本的窄线诊断总结。对勾（✓）表示类AGN线比，叉号（✗）表示与恒星形成一致的线比。破折号（–）表示相关线未以足够信噪比（小于3）检测到，省略号（⋯）表示该线超出波长覆盖范围。a a脚注：如果log(He II/H β) > -1.22，则源被分类为AGN。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Top panel: Number of diagnostics identifying each LRD as an AGN. Bottom panel: The percentage of available diagnostics that classify each LRD as AGN-like. We find that at least half of LRDs show multiple line diagnostics consistent with AGN photoionization.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：上方面板：将每个LRD识别为AGN的诊断数量。下方面板：将每个LRD分类为类AGN的可用诊断百分比。我们发现至少一半的LRD显示出多个与AGN光电离一致的线诊断。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: An UpSet diagram showing how the AGN classifications from different line diagnostics overlap. Here non-detections are treated as non-AGN, so the percentages represent lower limits. The bar plot on the top right shows the number of LRDs with overlapping diagnostics. At least 38% of LRDs have line ratios consistent with high ionization parameter and electron temperature but with a non-AGN-like ratio for the O1 diagnostic. At least 15% of LRDs in the sample have all three diagnostics collectively pointing to AGN or shocks. The bar plot on the bottom left shows the number of LRDs classified as AGN-like by each diagnostic individually.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：一个UpSet图，显示不同线诊断的AGN分类如何重叠。这里非检测被视为非AGN，因此百分比代表下限。右上角的条形图显示具有重叠诊断的LRD数量。至少38%的LRD具有与高电离参数和电子温度一致但O1诊断非类AGN的线比。样本中至少15%的LRD的所有三个诊断共同指向AGN或激波。左下角的条形图显示每个诊断单独分类为类AGN的LRD数量。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: A cross section of the possible gaseous structure surrounding LRDs. Incident radiation that goes through the higher gas columns will result in the Balmer break and absorption features observed in LRDs. The AGN-like line ratios suggest that there are low-density channels, possibly analogous to funnel-like regions, where the incident radiation is not reprocessed.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：LRD周围可能的气体结构横截面。穿过较高气体柱的入射辐射将导致LRD中观测到的巴尔末跳变和吸收特征。类AGN线比表明存在低密度通道，可能类似于漏斗状区域，其中入射辐射未被再处理。

title: The Lifecycle and Emission Properties of PAHs in Cosmological Hydrodynamic Galaxy Formation Simulations
comment: Submitted to the Open Journal of Astrophysics; Comments Welcome
summary: We present the first cosmological model for the lifecycle and luminous properties of PAHs in galaxies as they evolve from z=6-->0. We model 40 zoom-in galaxies, coupled with an on-the-fly model for the evolution of dust grains in the ISM. We assume that PAHs are ultrasmall (a < 13 Angstrom) carbonaceous dust grains, and couple this model with single-photon excitation calculations to compute the emergent mid-infrared spectra. (1) If we assume that dust is large upon formation, then PAHs are naturally able to form in situ in the ISM via grain-grain shattering. Interstellar collision velocities increase in low density, diffuse gas in our model; as galaxies evolve, the increase in fractional mass of diffuse gas drives an increase in grain-grain collision velocities and a corresponding rise in the PAH mass fraction (qPAH) from ~5 x 10^{-4} at z~4 to ~10^{-2} at z~0. (2) Increased PAH production in the diffuse ISM results in an inverse relationship between qPAH and the molecular gas fraction. (3) The PAH light-to-mass ratio scales linearly with the radiation field intensity (LPAH/MPAH ~ G_0) but anti-correlates with qPAH, because high-Sigma_SFR galaxies have a denser ISM that suppresses shattering. This means the physical qPAH and observed LPAH/LFIR do not evolve in lockstep. (4) The PAH-metallicity relationship (PZR) arises naturally in this framework: galaxies enrich and grow their diffuse ISM fraction simultaneously, linking rising metallicity to rising qPAH. Our models represent the first to reproduce the PZR observed across z=0-2. (5) The LPAH-SFR and LPAH-M_mol relations emerge from two effects: more massive galaxies have larger PAH reservoirs, and higher-SFR galaxies excite their PAHs more efficiently per unit mass. Taken together, these results suggest that grain-grain shattering in the diffuse ISM is the main driver behind the evolution of cosmic PAH abundances.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了首个从z=6到z=0的星系中PAH生命周期和光度的宇宙学模型，通过40个zoom-in星系模拟，发现ISM中尘埃-尘埃碎裂是PAH形成的主要机制，并成功再现了观测到的PAH-金属丰度关系（PZR）等一系列观测特征。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏对PAH在星系演化的宇宙学框架下生命周期和光度的系统性理论模型，作者希望建立首个从高红移到今的PAH演化模型，解释观测到的PAH丰度、光度与星系性质的关系。
AI.method: 采用40个zoom-in星系模拟，耦合ISM中尘埃演化的on-the-fly模型，假设PAH是超小碳质尘埃（a<13 Å），结合单光子激发计算中红外谱。
AI.result: (1) 尘埃形成时尺寸较大时，PAH可通过ISM中颗粒间碎裂原位形成；(2) PAH质量分数(qPAH)从z~4的~5e-4增加到z~0的~10^{-2}；(3) qPAH与分子气体分数呈反比；(4) PAH光质比与辐射场强度线性相关，但与qPAH反相关；(5) 成功再现z=0-2的PAH-金属丰度关系；(6) L_PAH与恒星形成率及分子气体质量的关系源于双重效应。
AI.conclusion: ISM中的尘埃-尘埃碎裂是宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要驱动力，模型首次成功再现了观测到的PAH-金属丰度关系。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了第一个宇宙学模型，用于描述星系从z=6演化到z=0过程中多环芳烃（PAHs）的生命周期和发光特性。我们对40个放大星系进行了建模，并结合了星际介质（ISM）中尘埃粒子演化的实时模型。我们假设PAHs是超小（a < 13埃）的碳质尘埃粒子，并将该模型与单光子激发计算相结合，以计算产生的中红外光谱。(1) 如果我们假设尘埃在形成时是大的，那么PAHs能够通过粒子间碎裂在ISM中原位形成。在我们的模型中，星际碰撞速度在低密度、弥散气体中增加；随着星系的演化，弥散气体质量分数的增加导致粒子间碰撞速度增加，相应地PAH质量分数（qPAH）从z~4时的约5 x 10^{-4}上升到z~0时的约10^{-2}。(2) 弥散ISM中PAH产量的增加导致qPAH与分子气体分数呈反比关系。(3) PAH光质比与辐射场强度呈线性关系（LPAH/MPAH ~ G_0），但与qPAH呈反相关，因为高Sigma_SFR的星系具有更致密的ISM，抑制了碎裂。这意味着物理上的qPAH和观测到的LPAH/LFIR并非同步演化。(4) PAH-金属丰度关系（PZR）在此框架中自然产生：星系同时富集金属并增加其弥散ISM比例，将金属丰度的上升与qPAH的上升联系起来。我们的模型首次再现了在z=0-2范围内观测到的PZR。(5) LPAH-SFR和LPAH-M_mol关系源于两个效应：质量更大的星系拥有更大的PAH储库，而SFR更高的星系能更有效地激发其单位质量的PAH。综合这些结果，表明弥散ISM中的粒子间碎裂是宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要驱动力。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，ISM中的尘埃-尘埃碎裂是宇宙PAH丰度演化的主要驱动力，模型首次成功再现了观测到的PAH-金属丰度关系。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Physical properties of our model galaxy sample, measured at each galaxy’s final simulation snapshot. Columns are: galaxy name, \(z_{final}\) , \(M_{*}\) , \(M_{gas}\) , \(M_{dust}\) , \(M_{200}\) , metallicity, and SFR.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：我们模型星系样本的物理性质，在每个星系最终模拟快照处测量。列依次为：星系名称、\(z_{final}\)、\(M_{*}\)、\(M_{gas}\)、\(M_{dust}\)、\(M_{200}\)、金属丰度和SFR。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Mid-infrared spectral decomposition of six representative simulated galaxies at \(z\leq 0.5\) using pahfit . Each panel shows the rest-frame mid-IR SED (grey) along with the pahfit best-fit decomposition. The solid orange curve shows the total model (continuum plus all PAH features). Individual PAH feature families are shown as color-filled regions stacked on the continuum, with the major complexes at \(3.3\) , \(6.2\) , \(7.7\) , \(8.6\) , \(11.3\) , \(12.7\) , and \(17\;\mu\) m indicated in the legend. Vertical dotted lines mark the \(3.3\) , \(6.2\) , \(7.7\) , and \(11.3\;\mu\) m feature positions for reference.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：使用pahfit对六个代表性模拟星系在\(z\leq 0.5\)时的中红外光谱分解。每个面板显示静止系中红外SED（灰色）以及pahfit最佳拟合分解。橙色实线显示总模型（连续谱加上所有PAH特征）。各个PAH特征族显示为叠加在连续谱上的彩色填充区域，图例中标出了\(3.3\)、\(6.2\)、\(7.7\)、\(8.6\)、\(11.3\)、\(12.7\)和\(17\;\mu\)m的主要复合体。垂直虚线标出了\(3.3\)、\(6.2\)、\(7.7\)和\(11.3\;\mu\)m特征位置以供参考。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The evolution of the ISM physical conditions in the vicinity of dust over cosmic time. Top: Violin plot showing the distribution of gas densities for gas particles that neighbor dust particles in our model galaxy sample. Broadly, toward late times ( \(z\lesssim 4\) in this case), the average gas densities decrease with time. The horizontal lines show the median and interquartile ranges. Bottom: \(\rho_{gas}-T_{gas}\) plot for gas particles surrounding dust particles (colored), and all gas particles (dashed contours) at \(z=5,3,0\) for our model galaxy sample. The colors are a heat map representing the density of points.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：宇宙时间尺度上尘埃附近ISM物理条件的演化。上：小提琴图显示我们模型星系样本中与尘埃粒子相邻的气体粒子的气体密度分布。总体而言，在晚期（此处为\(z\lesssim 4\)），平均气体密度随时间降低。水平线显示中位数和四分位距。下：我们模型星系样本在\(z=5,3,0\)时，尘埃粒子周围气体粒子（彩色）和所有气体粒子（虚线轮廓）的\(\rho_{gas}-T_{gas}\)图。颜色是表示点密度的热力图。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Distribution of dust grain collision velocities as a function of redshift for model galaxy sample. The boxenplots show the mass-weighted statistics (weighting by grain mass across size bins). The shaded region shows the range of shattering threshold velocities that we assume for silicates and carbonaceous grains. The increase in grain-grain collision velocity at \(z\lesssim 4\) is a direct consequence of the evolution of ISM physical conditions with redshift (cf. Figure 2 ).
figures.caption_zh: 图3：模型星系样本中尘埃粒子碰撞速度随红移的分布。箱线图显示质量加权统计（按尺寸区间内的粒子质量加权）。阴影区域显示我们假设的硅酸盐和碳质粒子的碎裂阈值速度范围。\(z\lesssim 4\)时粒子间碰撞速度的增加是ISM物理条件随红移演化的直接结果（参见图2）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Evolution of normalized grain size distribution for our model sample of galaxies with cosmic time. Galaxies are binned (bottom to top) at \(z 6\) , and all galaxies are shown up top, color coded by redshift. For reference, the Mathis et al. ( 1977 ) grain size distribution is shown in all panels with a thick dash-dot line. Ultrasmall grains that could be considered PAHs are shown in the grey shaded region, though we note that the grain size distribution is shown for all dust (silicates and carbonaceous grains). As the typical interaction velocities increase with decreasing redshift (Figure 3 ), the small-to-large ratio increases with decreasing \(z\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：模型星系样本中归一化粒径分布随宇宙时间的演化。星系按红移\(z 6\)分箱（从下到上），所有星系显示在顶部，按红移着色。作为参考，所有面板中用粗点划线显示了Mathis等人（1977）的粒径分布。可被视为PAHs的超小粒子显示在灰色阴影区域，但我们注意到粒径分布是针对所有尘埃（硅酸盐和碳质粒子）显示的。随着典型相互作用速度随红移降低而增加（图3），小粒子与大粒子的比率随\(z\)降低而增加。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: \(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\) distributions for our model galaxies, binned by redshift. The median of each distribution is shown by a thin dashed vertical line, and the number of galaxies that comprise each distribution is noted by the redshift markers. The median of the distribution follows the cosmic evolution of the gas density (cf. Figure 2 ). As redshift decreases below \(z\sim 4\) , the mass fraction of diffuse ISM increases, resulting in larger dust interaction velocities. This increases the grain-grain shattering events, and therefore fraction of ultrasmall dust grains. The consequence of this is increased \(q_{PAH}\) fractions between \(z\approx 4\rightarrow 0\) , with median values of a few percent at \(z\approx 0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：模型星系按红移分箱的\(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\)分布。每个分布的中位数用细虚线垂直线表示，构成每个分布的星系数量由红移标记注明。分布的中位数遵循气体密度的宇宙演化（参见图2）。当红移降至\(z\sim 4\)以下时，弥散ISM的质量分数增加，导致更大的尘埃相互作用速度。这增加了粒子间碎裂事件，从而增加了超小尘埃粒子的比例。其结果是\(q_{PAH}\)分数在\(z\approx 4\rightarrow 0\)之间增加，在\(z\approx 0\)时中位数达到百分之几。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Morphological evolution of the stellar, gas, and PAH surface density distributions for an example galaxy (galaxy 10407) from \(z=4\rightarrow 0\) . Columns show, from left to right, the stellar surface density \(\Sigma_{\star}\) , gas surface density \(\Sigma_{gas}\) , and PAH surface density \(\Sigma_{PAH}\) , while rows correspond to \(z=4.0\) , \(2.0\) , \(0.75\) , and \(0.0\) (top to bottom). Each column shares a common colorbar normalization. At \(z\sim 4\) , the galaxy is compact and gas-rich, with PAHs confined to a small number of sites. By \(z\sim 0\) , the galaxy has developed an extended disk, and PAHs trace the diffuse ISM spiral structure (cf. Figures 2 – 7 ). The global PAH mass fraction \(q_{PAH}\) (annotated in the right column) increases from \(<0.1\%\) at \(z=2\) to \(\sim 4\%\) at \(z=0\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图6：一个示例星系（星系10407）从\(z=4\rightarrow 0\)的恒星、气体和PAH面密度分布的形态演化。列从左到右依次显示恒星面密度\(\Sigma_{\star}\)、气体面密度\(\Sigma_{gas}\)和PAH面密度\(\Sigma_{PAH}\)，而行对应\(z=4.0\)、\(2.0\)、\(0.75\)和\(0.0\)（从上到下）。每列共享相同的色标归一化。在\(z\sim 4\)时，星系致密且富含气体，PAHs局限于少量位置。到\(z\sim 0\)时，星系已发展出延展盘，PAHs示踪弥散ISM的旋臂结构（参见图2-7）。全局PAH质量分数\(q_{PAH}\)（在右列中标注）从\(z=2\)时的\(<0.1\%\)增加到\(z=0\)时的\(\sim 4\%\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: The molecular gas fraction and \(q_{PAH}\) evolve inversely over cosmic time. We show the redshift evolution of the molecular gas fraction \(f_{mol}\) (blue; left axis) and \(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\) (red; right axis) for an example galaxy (galaxy 10407) from our simulation sample. The two quantities track nearly inversely such that when the \(f_{mol}\) is low, \(q_{PAH}\) is elevated owing to increased grain-grain interaction velocities in the diffuse ISM (which increases shattering rates, and therefore, the fraction of PAH grains).
figures.caption_zh: 图7：分子气体分数和\(q_{PAH}\)随宇宙时间呈反比演化。我们展示了模拟样本中一个示例星系（星系10407）的分子气体分数\(f_{mol}\)（蓝色；左轴）和\(q_{PAH}\equiv M_{PAH}/M_{dust}\)（红色；右轴）随红移的演化。这两个量几乎呈反比关系，即当\(f_{mol}\)较低时，由于弥散ISM中粒子间相互作用速度增加（这增加了碎裂速率，从而增加了PAH粒子的比例），\(q_{PAH}\)升高。

title: Direct detection of cool molecular gas in a star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$
comment: Accepted for publication in MNRAS. Main text: 17 pages, 6 figures
summary: We investigate the molecular gas content and interstellar medium (ISM) conditions of REBELS-25, a massive, star-forming galaxy at $z=7.31$. Deep VLA Q-band and ALMA Band 3 observations reveal CO(3-2) and CO(7-6) emission (both at $\sim3.5σ$), and provide an upper limit on [C I](2-1). From the CMB-corrected CO(3-2) flux-representing the highest-redshift detection of a low-$J$ CO transition to date-we derive a molecular gas mass of $M_{\rm mol}=(1.0\pm0.4)\times10^{11}\,(α_{\rm CO}/(3\,$M$_{\odot}$(K$\,$\kms$\,$pc$^2)^{-1}))\,$M$_{\odot}$, directly confirming the presence of a very massive gas reservoir only $\simeq700\,$Myr after the Big Bang. This implies an extreme gas fraction of $f_{\rm gas}\simeq0.95$, a gas-to-dust ratio of $δ_{\rm GDR}\simeq6\times10^2$, and a depletion timescale of $τ_{\rm dep}\simeq1.2\,$Gyr, broadly consistent with extrapolated scaling relations for main-sequence galaxies at lower redshift. Using the radiative transfer code TUNER, we self-consistently model CO and dust continuum emission in the context of the significant CMB background, constraining ISM properties and recovering $M_{\rm mol}= (1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})\times10^{11}\,$M$_{\odot}$, independent of assumptions about $r_{31}$ and $α_{\rm CO}$. We further discuss the use of alternative molecular gas tracers at early epochs. Combining CO and [C II] measurements, we infer an empirical [C II]-to-H$_2$ conversion factor of $α_{\rm [C II]}=(60\pm25)\,$M$_{\odot}$/L$_{\odot}$, suggesting [C II] remains a viable molecular gas tracer in the Epoch of Reionization. These results demonstrate the detectability of low-$J$ CO emission even at $z>7$, paving the way for next-generation facilities, and provide critical insights into the rapid mass assembly of galaxies during the first billion years of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过探测z=7.31星系REBELS-25的CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，确认了宇宙大爆炸后仅7亿年就存在一个极端巨大的分子气体库（约10¹¹ M☉），气体分数高达95%，并验证了[C II]作为早期宇宙分子气体示踪剂的可行性。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索早期宇宙（再电离时代）星系的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，以理解星系在宇宙最初十亿年内的快速质量积累过程。
AI.method: 利用VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射线，结合辐射传输代码TUNER自洽建模CO和尘埃连续谱发射，并考虑宇宙微波背景（CMB）的影响。
AI.result: 探测到CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（均约3.5σ），获得分子气体质量约1.0×10¹¹ M☉（依赖α_CO假设）或1.8×10¹¹ M☉（通过TUNER建模），气体分数约0.95，气体尘埃比约600，消耗时标约1.2 Gyr，并推导出[C II]-H₂转换因子为60±25 M☉/L☉。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们研究了REBELS-25的分子气体含量和星际介质条件，这是一个红移z=7.31的大质量恒星形成星系。深度VLA Q波段和ALMA Band 3观测揭示了CO(3-2)和CO(7-6)发射（两者均为~3.5σ），并提供了[C I](2-1)的上限。根据经过宇宙微波背景修正的CO(3-2)通量——这是迄今为止对低J CO跃迁的最高红移探测——我们推导出分子气体质量为M_mol=(1.0±0.4)×10^11 (α_CO/(3 M_⊙ (K km s pc^2)^{-1})) M_⊙，直接证实了大爆炸后仅约700 Myr存在一个巨大的气体储库。这意味着极端的气体分数f_gas≈0.95、气尘比δ_GDR≈6×10^2以及消耗时标τ_dep≈1.2 Gyr，与较低红移主序星系的推断标度关系大致一致。利用辐射传输代码TUNER，我们在显著宇宙微波背景的背景下自洽地模拟了CO和尘埃连续谱发射，约束了星际介质性质，并恢复了M_mol=(1.8^{+1.0}_{-0.9})×10^11 M_⊙，独立于关于r_31和α_CO的假设。我们进一步讨论了早期宇宙中替代分子气体示踪剂的使用。结合CO和[C II]测量，我们推断出经验性的[C II]-H_2转换因子α_[C II]=(60±25) M_⊙/L_⊙，表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂。这些结果证明了即使在z>7时低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代设施铺平了道路，并提供了对宇宙历史最初十亿年内星系快速质量积累的关键见解。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，该工作直接证实了z>7星系中低J CO发射的可探测性，为下一代观测设施铺平道路，并表明[C II]在再电离时代仍是可行的分子气体示踪剂，揭示了早期星系快速质量积累的关键信息。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Spectra of REBELS-25 showing the detected line emission of CO(3–2) ( top panel ) and CO(7–6) together with the undetected [C i ](2–1) emission ( bottom panel ). In each panel, we show the data presented in this paper as an aqua histogram and the respective \(\pm 1\sigma\) as a grey shaded area. We also display a comparison with the [C ii ] spectrum which is detected at high S/N in this source (yellow hatched histogram), rescaled to match the amplitude of the CO emission. Vertical dash-dotted lines and shaded areas show the expected frequency and \(\pm 1\times\) FWHM \({}_{{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}}\) region of each line based on the [C ii ]-based redshift of the source. Red lines show the best-fit Gaussian to the CO line when leaving all parameters free, while orange lines show the best-fit to the [C ii ] data rescaled to the amplitude of the CO emission. In the top panel, there are some gaps in the CO(3–2) data due to fully flagged channels at the edge of spectral windows.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：REBELS-25的光谱，显示探测到的CO(3–2)（上图）和CO(7–6)以及未探测到的[C i](2–1)发射（下图）。在每个面板中，我们以浅蓝色直方图显示本文呈现的数据，并以灰色阴影区域显示相应的±1σ。我们还展示了与[C ii]光谱的比较，该光谱在该源中以高信噪比探测到（黄色阴影直方图），已重新缩放以匹配CO发射的振幅。垂直点划线及阴影区域显示了基于源[C ii]红移的每条线的预期频率和±1×FWHM_[C ii]区域。红线显示当所有参数自由时CO线的最佳拟合高斯，而橙线显示重新缩放至CO发射振幅的[C ii]数据的最佳拟合。在上图中，由于光谱窗口边缘的完全标记通道，CO(3–2)数据中存在一些间隙。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Black contours ( \([-3,-2,2,3]\sigma\) ) show the velocity-integrated emission of CO(3–2) ( left panel ) and of CO(7–6) ( right panel ) overlaid on the [C ii ] moment 0 map obtained from the REBELS large program data. We also show the contours for the [C ii ] emission (white, \([-3,-2,2,3,5,12]\sigma\) ) and ALMA band 6 continuum tracing the dust emission (orange, \([-3,-2,2,3,5]\sigma\) ). Synthesized beams for each dataset are shown as ellipses of the corresponding colour in the bottom left corner of the plot. The positions of the peak of the detected CO lines are consistent with the known position of the source.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：黑色等值线（[-3,-2,2,3]σ）显示CO(3–2)（左图）和CO(7–6)（右图）的速度积分发射，叠加在从REBELS大型计划数据获得的[C ii]矩0图上。我们还显示了[C ii]发射（白色，[-3,-2,2,3,5,12]σ）和追踪尘埃发射的ALMA波段6连续谱（橙色，[-3,-2,2,3,5]σ）的等值线。每个数据集的合成波束在图的左下角以相应颜色的椭圆显示。探测到的CO线峰值位置与已知的源位置一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Molecular gas depletion timescale as a function of redshift for galaxies across cosmic time (adapted from Zavala et al. , 2022 ) . The large symbols mark the values derived for REBELS-25, assuming the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and \(\alpha_{CO}=3\) and 1 (magenta and aqua star, respectively); for clarity, the aqua star has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. Both values are broadly consistent with the extrapolation to \(z\sim 7\) of the best-fit relation for main-sequence (MS) galaxies from Tacconi et al. ( 2020 ) (solid purple line). The dashed maroon line represents the corresponding fit from the same study for starburst (SB) galaxies. Blue and red circles indicate the individual sources in their respective MS and SB samples. The dash-dotted line shows the relation from Sommovigo et al. ( 2022b , a ) based on the evolution of mean baryonic accretion rates onto dark matter halos in dark-matter–only simulations. The hatched gray boxes mark the typical range of values derived for MS galaxies at \(z\sim 4-6\) from [C ii ]-based gas masses in the ALPINE survey (Dessauges-Zavadsky et al. , 2020 ) , while the black ones mark the range of values derived from [C ii ]-based gas masses for the REBELS sample (Aravena et al. , 2024 ) . Additional high-redshift measurements from the literature are shown for comparison: the orange circle represents the lensed MS galaxy studied in Zavala et al. ( 2022 ) , the yellow hexagon represents HZ10 from Pavesi et al. ( 2019 ) , and green open triangles indicate SPT-selected DSFGs from Aravena et al. ( 2016 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：宇宙时间中星系分子气体消耗时标随红移的变化（改编自Zavala等人，2022）。大符号标记了REBELS-25推导的值，假设经过CMB修正的CO光度和α_CO=3（洋红色星）和1（浅蓝色星）；为清晰起见，浅蓝色星在红移上略有偏移以避免误差棒重叠。两个值与Tacconi等人（2020）对主序星系最佳拟合关系外推到z~7（实紫线）大致一致。虚线栗色线表示同一研究对星暴星系的相应拟合。蓝色和红色圆圈分别表示其主序和星暴样本中的个别源。点划线表示Sommovigo等人（2022b, a）基于暗物质仅模拟中暗物质晕平均重子吸积率演化的关系。阴影灰色框标记了ALPINE巡测中基于[C ii]气体质量在z~4-6主序星系的典型值范围（Dessauges-Zavadsky等人，2020），而黑色框标记了REBELS样本中基于[C ii]气体质量的值范围（Aravena等人，2024）。文献中的其他高红移测量值也显示用于比较：橙色圆圈代表Zavala等人（2022）研究的透镜主序星系，黄色六边形代表Pavesi等人（2019）的HZ10，绿色空心三角形代表Aravena等人（2016）的SPT选择DSFG。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Dust spectral energy distribution (SED; left panel ) and CO spectral line energy distribution (SLED; right panel ) of REBELS-25 derived by fitting the observed continuum and line fluxes (black points for detections, arrows for \(1\sigma\) upper limits) self-consistently with the TUNER model. The black dashed lines represent the best-fit median model to the data given the priors, while the gray shaded regions show the 16th–84th percentile ranges. Coloured dotted lines represent the contribution of a few individual molecular gas density components, as described in the legend (and scaled up for visibility). The CO SLED in the model peaks around \(J\simeq 5\) , consistent with moderately excited molecular gas conditions.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：REBELS-25的尘埃光谱能量分布（左图）和CO谱线能量分布（右图），通过使用TUNER模型自洽拟合观测到的连续谱和线通量（黑色点表示探测，箭头表示1σ上限）得出。黑色虚线表示给定先验下数据的最佳拟合中值模型，而灰色阴影区域显示第16-84百分位范围。彩色虚线表示几个个别分子气体密度成分的贡献，如图例所述（并缩放以提高可见性）。模型中的CO谱线能量分布在J≃5附近达到峰值，与中等激发的分子气体条件一致。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Evolution of the [C ii ]-to-H 2 conversion factor ( \(\alpha_{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}\) ) as a function of redshift. We include measurements drawn from the literature for main-sequence galaxies (MS), starburst galaxies (SB) and Lymann break analogues (LBA) (Stacey et al. , 1991 ; Ferkinhoff et al. , 2014 ; Huynh et al. , 2014 ; Magdis et al. , 2014 ; Capak et al. , 2015 ; Cormier et al. , 2015 ; Gullberg et al. , 2015 ; Schaerer et al. , 2015 ; Madden et al. , 2016 ; Accurso et al. , 2017 ; Contursi et al. , 2017 ; Hughes et al. , 2017 ; Zanella et al. , 2018 ; Rizzo et al. , 2020 , 2021 ) . The horizontal lines and shaded regions represent the mean and 1 \(\sigma\) scatter of the empirical \(\alpha_{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}\) calibrations from Zanella et al. ( 2018 ) (pink, solid line) and Zhao et al. ( 2024 ) (cyan, dashed line), and the median of the sample studied in Rizzo et al. ( 2021 ) (cornflower blue, dash-dotted line). The large star symbols indicate the \(\alpha_{[C\,\textsc{ii}]}\) values we derive for REBELS-25 using the CMB-corrected CO luminosity and assuming either \(\alpha_{CO}=3\) (magenta) or \(\alpha_{CO}=1\) (aqua). The yellow and orange hexagons both refer to HZ10 (see text; Pavesi et al. , 2019 ; Algera et al. , 2025a ) , the latter has been slightly offset in redshift to avoid overlapping error bars. The values derived for REBELS-25 are broadly consistent with most low- and intermediate-redshift studies, suggesting that the [C ii ] line remains an effective, though scattered, tracer of the molecular gas reservoir even at \(z>7\) .

title: SIDM and CDM interpretations of the million-solar-mass lensing perturber JVAS B1938+666-$\mathcal{V}$
comment: 6 pages, 3 figures
summary: A $10^6\,M_\odot$ object has recently been inferred from gravitational imaging of the strong-lensing system JVAS B1938+666, exhibiting an unusually dense inner region embedded within an extended envelope, far exceeding expectations for cold dark matter (CDM) halos. Using gravothermal fluid simulations, we show that such a structure arises naturally in self-interacting dark matter (SIDM) halos evolving into a deep core-collapse phase, where a secondary dense central core forms within an extended profile. The resulting density structure closely matches the inferred properties of the lensing object. We also demonstrate that a similar profile could be reproduced in CDM in the presence of an intermediate-mass black hole, but this requires an early-forming progenitor that subsequently loses $5$ orders of magnitude in mass through tidal stripping by the lens galaxy. Whether such a scenario can be realized in realistic cosmological environments remains an open question.

AI.tldr: 通过引力热流体模拟，研究表明自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）晕在深度核塌缩阶段会自然形成致密中心核与扩展包层结构，这与强透镜系统JVAS B1938+666中观测到的$10^6\,M_\odot$致密天体特征高度吻合；而冷暗物质（CDM）模型则需要早期形成的中等质量黑洞经历极端潮汐剥离才能勉强复现，但其宇宙学可行性存疑。
AI.motivation: 强透镜系统JVAS B1938+666中推断存在一个质量约$10^6\,M_\odot$的致密天体，其内区密度异常高且嵌于扩展包层中，远超冷暗物质（CDM）晕的预期。这一观测异常亟需理论解释。
AI.method: 采用引力热流体模拟，研究自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）晕的演化过程，特别是深度核塌缩阶段的结构形成。同时对比分析CDM模型中引入中等质量黑洞的替代方案。
AI.result: SIDM晕在深度核塌缩阶段会自然形成次级致密中心核嵌于扩展剖面中的结构，其密度分布与透镜天体的推断性质高度一致。CDM模型需借助早期形成的中等质量黑洞，并经宿主星系潮汐剥离损失5个数量级质量，但该场景的宇宙学真实性存疑。
AI.conclusion: SIDM模型能自然解释JVAS B1938+666中的致密天体结构，而CDM替代方案面临严重的物理和宇宙学困难，该结果支持SIDM作为暗物质候选者的可能性。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 最近，从强透镜系统JVAS B1938+666的引力成像中推断出一个质量约为10^6太阳质量的天体，其内部区域异常致密，并被一个延展的包层所包围，这远远超出了冷暗物质（CDM）晕的预期。通过使用引力热流体模拟，我们展示了这种结构在自相互作用暗物质（SIDM）晕中自然形成，并演化至深度核心坍缩阶段，此时在延展的轮廓内部形成了一个次级致密核心。由此产生的密度结构与透镜天体的推断性质高度吻合。我们还证明，在存在中等质量黑洞的情况下，CDM也能再现类似的轮廓，但这需要一个早期形成的祖先，随后通过透镜星系的潮汐剥离损失了5个数量级的质量。这种情景是否能在现实宇宙学环境中实现，仍是一个悬而未决的问题。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的结论：SIDM模型能自然解释JVAS B1938+666中的致密天体结构，而CDM替代方案面临严重的物理和宇宙学困难，该结果支持SIDM作为暗物质候选者的可能性。

title: High-Resolution ALMA Imaging for a Gravitationally-lensed Quasar at $z=6.5$: Constraining the AGN Contribution to Galactic-Scale Dust Heating
comment: Accepted by ApJL
summary: We present high-resolution (beam size $0\farcs076\times0\farcs040$) Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA) observations of the far-infrared $(λ_\text{rest}=162.7μ\rm{m})$ dust continuum of J0439+1634, a gravitationally lensed quasar at $z=6.52$. We perform pixelated lens modeling for the visibility data, finding that J0439+1634 is well-described by a singular isothermal ellipsoid plus an external shear lensing model. The best-fit lensing potential exhibits a naked-cusp configuration, confirming the finding in Fan et al. (2019). The reconstructed source plane continuum emission shows a compact bright core, with size $\lesssim200$ pc and peak brightness $\sim0.6 \text{ Jy arcsec}^{-2}$. The total continuum flux at 245 GHz is $3.36\pm0.02$ mJy. The flux magnification is {$4.63\pm0.03$}, indicating an average source-plane resolution of $0\farcs019$ (equivalent to 104 pc). The spatial resolution around the supermassive black hole reaches $\sim36$ pc. %Using the new lensing model, we re-fit the Hubble Space Telescope image for J0439+1634, and find that the position of the optical quasar is consistent with the brightest pixel in the dust continuum map. Leveraging the exceptional source-plane resolution, we build a radiative transfer model to describe the observed dust emission profile. The best-fit model indicates that heated dust from the active galactic nucleus (AGN) dominates the sub-millimeter emission at $r\lesssim100$ pc and that star-heated dust dominates the outer region of the host galaxy. AGN heating contributes {$\sim13\%$} to the observed sub-mm flux. Therefore, previous far-infrared-based star formation rate measurements for most high-redshift quasars are likely mildly overestimated.

AI.tldr: 利用高分辨率ALMA对红移6.52的引力透镜类星体J0439+1634进行成像，通过像素化透镜建模发现其具有裸露尖点结构，重建源平面显示紧凑亮核（<200 pc），总流量3.36 mJy，放大率4.63。AGN加热主导亚毫米辐射在<100 pc区域，对观测亚毫米流量贡献约13%，表明高红移类星体基于远红外的恒星形成率测量可能被高估。
AI.motivation: 高红移类星体的尘埃辐射来源（AGN加热 vs 恒星加热）尚不明确，传统远红外恒星形成率测量可能因AGN污染而被高估，需要高分辨率观测区分不同加热机制。
AI.method: 使用ALMA对z=6.52的引力透镜类星体进行162.7μm尘埃连续谱成像（波束0.076″×0.040″），对可见度数据进行像素化透镜建模（SIE+外剪切），重建源平面，并构建辐射传输模型拟合尘埃发射轮廓。
AI.result: 最佳透镜模型呈现裸露尖点构型；源平面亮核<200 pc，峰值亮度~0.6 Jy/arcsec²；总流量3.36±0.02 mJy；流量放大率4.63±0.03；源平面分辨率达0.019″（~104 pc），黑洞附近空间分辨率~36 pc；AGN加热在r<100 pc区域主导，对亚毫米流量贡献~13%。
AI.conclusion: 高红移类星体的亚毫米辐射在中心约100 pc内由AGN加热主导，外部由恒星加热主导。以往基于远红外的高红移类星体恒星形成率测量可能被轻度高估。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们展示了高分辨率（波束大小 $0\farcs076\times0\farcs040$）的阿塔卡马大型毫米/亚毫米阵列（ALMA）对 J0439+1634（一个引力透镜类星体，红移 $z=6.52$）的远红外 $(\lambda_\text{rest}=162.7\mu\rm{m})$ 尘埃连续谱观测。我们对可见度数据进行了像素化透镜建模，发现 J0439+1634 可以很好地由一个奇异等温椭球体加外部剪切透镜模型描述。最佳拟合透镜势呈现裸尖点构型，证实了 Fan 等人（2019）的发现。重建的源平面连续谱发射显示出一个紧凑的亮核，大小 $\lesssim200$ pc，峰值亮度 $\sim0.6 \text{ Jy arcsec}^{-2}$。245 GHz 的总连续谱流量为 $3.36\pm0.02$ mJy。流量放大率为 {$4.63\pm0.03$}，表明平均源平面分辨率为 $0\farcs019$（相当于 104 pc）。超大质量黑洞周围的空间分辨率达到 $\sim36$ pc。利用新的透镜模型，我们重新拟合了 J0439+1634 的哈勃空间望远镜图像，发现光学类星体的位置与尘埃连续谱图中最亮的像素一致。借助卓越的源平面分辨率，我们构建了一个辐射传输模型来描述观测到的尘埃发射轮廓。最佳拟合模型表明，活动星系核（AGN）加热的尘埃主导了 $r\lesssim100$ pc 处的亚毫米发射，而恒星加热的尘埃主导了宿主星系的外部区域。AGN 加热对观测到的亚毫米流量的贡献约为 {$\sim13\%$}。因此，以往基于远红外的高红移类星体恒星形成率测量可能被轻度高估。

title: Multiphase images of a powerful supernova-driven wind in the early Universe
comment: Published in MNRAS Letters; 6 page main text + 7 page supplement
summary: Galactic winds are considered a likely driver of rapid quenching in early massive galaxies, but until now there has been no direct evidence that such systems drive winds powerful enough to meaningfully suppress their star-formation. We present resolved cold gas and ionized gas observations of a powerful supernova-driven wind in a massive galaxy 1.1 billion years after the Big Bang (at $z$=5.3). The outflow, likely triggered by ongoing merger activity, is removing gas at twice the rate of star-formation and could plausibly eject all the cold gas from the galaxy within 100 Myr. Our results suggest that powerful merger-driven outflows may be a key mechanism to produce abundant massive quiescent galaxies in the early Universe when a large fraction of massive galaxies are interacting. The mass and energetics of this distant outflow are consistent with nearby starburst-driven superwinds, suggesting that the efficiency of stellar feedback has remained relatively constant over the last 12 billion years of cosmic history.

AI.tldr: 该研究首次直接观测到早期宇宙（大爆炸后11亿年）大质量星系中由超新星驱动的强大星系风，其气体排出速率是恒星形成速率的两倍，可能在1亿年内排空星系所有冷气体，为早期宇宙大质量静态星系的形成机制提供了关键证据。
AI.motivation: 此前缺乏直接观测证据证明早期大质量星系中的星系风能够有效抑制恒星形成，因此需要寻找确凿的观测数据来验证这一理论机制。
AI.method: 利用分辨率的冷气体和电离气体观测数据，对红移z=5.3（大爆炸后11亿年）的一个大质量星系中的超新星驱动风进行详细分析。

AI.conclusion: 强大的并合驱动外流可能是早期宇宙产生大量大质量静态星系的关键机制，且恒星反馈效率在过去120亿年间保持相对恒定。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系风被认为是早期大质量星系快速熄灭的可能驱动因素，但迄今为止尚无直接证据表明此类系统能驱动足够强大的风来有效抑制其恒星形成。我们展示了在大爆炸后11亿年（红移$z$=5.3）的一个大质量星系中，由超新星驱动的强大星系风的分辨冷气体和电离气体观测结果。该外流很可能由持续的并合活动触发，其气体移除速率是恒星形成速率的两倍，并可能在1亿年内将星系中的所有冷气体全部排出。我们的结果表明，强大的并合驱动外流可能是早期宇宙中产生大量大质量静态星系的关键机制，尤其是在大质量星系中很大一部分正在相互作用的时期。这一遥远外流的质量和能量特征与邻近星暴驱动的超星系风一致，表明恒星反馈效率在过去120亿年的宇宙历史中保持相对恒定。

title: JWST absorption line spectroscopy with SPURS: ISM covering fractions and kinematics in individual galaxies at $z=5-9$
comment: Submitted to ApJ. 31 pages, 18 figures, 4 Tables (including appendix). Comments welcome
summary: We present deep rest-ultraviolet (UV) spectra of six luminous $z=5$ -- 9 galaxies in the Abell-2744 field taken as part of the JWST Cycle 4 Large Program SPURS. The individual galaxy spectra show unambiguous detections of interstellar medium (ISM) metal absorption lines from low- and high-ionization states of enriched gas, which we use to probe the ISM gas porosity and kinematics. We find a striking diversity in the absorption profiles. We find low-ionization gas covering fractions ranging from 0.2 to 0.9, indicating a heterogeneous and patchy neutral ISM. The low-ionization kinematics also show a large diversity, with velocity centroid values ranging from $+$70 to a significantly blueshifted $-140$ km$\,$s$^{-1}$, while the high-ion gas shows mostly blueshifted absorption, indicating the presence of multiphase outflows. While all sources show outflow signatures in blueshifted wings, we also find that half of our sample, in particular those with the lowest stellar masses and highest sSFRs, have low-ionization velocity centroids close to systemic velocities. This is in contrast to near-ubiquitous bulk low-ionization gas outflows at lower redshifts. We suggest that this diversity of kinematics may be due to the bulk of the cold gas having low outflow velocities in the lowest mass and highest sSFR systems, potentially due to inefficient entrainment and/or an unresolved infalling component. These spectra reveal a metal-enriched ISM with complex gas geometry and kinematics, and highlight the potential of deep JWST grating spectroscopy to reveal the properties of the ISM during the reionization era.

title: The free-streaming length of dark matter from JWST observations of 28 strong gravitational lenses
comment: accepted by PRL
summary: The formation of gravitationally bound overdensities of dark matter (DM), or \textit{halos}, is a generic prediction of theories with particle DM. We present a measurement of halo properties in 28 quadruple image strong lens systems recently observed by JWST, and use these observations to constrain the free-streaming length, $λ_{\rm{FS}}$, of DM, a quantity that depends on the DM particle mass and formation mechanism. We improve on previous lensing analyses by simultaneously reconstructing extended lensed arcs with image positions and relative magnifications, enhancing sensitivity to perturbations by halos. Our analysis rules out deviations from the predictions of cold dark matter (CDM) on scales above $10^{7.2} M_{\odot}$ and $10^{7.4} M_{\odot}$ for subhalo abundance predicted by cosmological $N$-body simulations and semi-analytic models, respectively. These bounds correspond to upper limits $λ_{\rm{FS}}<6.0 \ \rm{kpc}$ and $λ_{\rm{FS}}<7.0 \ \rm{kpc}$, and lower limits on the mass of a spin--1/2 thermal relic DM particle $m_{\rm{therm}}>7.4 \ \rm{keV}$ and $m_{\rm{therm}}>6.5 \ \rm{keV}$. Conversely, assuming a negligible free-streaming length, as predicted by CDM, we measure a projected mass in subhalos around elliptical galaxies $1.7_{-1.2}^{+2.6} \times 10^7 \ \mathrm{M}_{\odot} \ \rm{kpc^{-2}}$ at $95 \%$ confidence. These inferences confirm key predictions of the CDM paradigm.

AI.tldr: 该研究利用JWST观测的28个四重像强透镜系统，通过同时重建延展透镜弧、位置和相对放大率，测量暗物质晕性质，约束暗物质自由流长，排除了冷暗物质标准预测的显著偏离，证实了CDM范式的关键预测。

title: A Cosmic Archipelago of lensed metal-poor galaxies at $z\sim6$
comment: 15 pages (22 including Appendices), 7 figures. Accepted for publication in A&A
summary: The Cosmic Archipelago is an ensemble of galaxies, strongly lensed by the cluster MACSJ0416, showing extreme physical properties at $z\sim6.14$. We combine JWST/NIRCam with deep VLT/X-Shooter and JWST/NIRSpec IFU to perform a joint spectrophotometric analysis from the far ultraviolet to red optical rest-frame. We focus on CA4, a UV-faint ($M_{UV}=-17.7$), compact ($r_e=81\pm11$ pc) galaxy at $z=6.1446$, magnified by a factor $μ=3.73$. CA4 is a young, low-mass ($M_\star =4.3\times10^6$ M$\odot$), star-forming (${\rm SFR}=0.46$ M$\odot$/yr), and metal-poor ($Z\sim0.02$ Z$\odot$) galaxy, and an efficient producer of ionizing photons ($\log(ξ_{ion}/{\rm erg^{-1} Hz})\sim25.5$). Its properties place CA4 at the poorly explored interface between massive stellar clusters and dwarf galaxies during the epoch of reionization. Moreover, CA4 shows large Ly$α$ ($f_{esc}^{\rm Lyα}\sim43\%$) and Lyman-continuum ($f_{esc}\sim47\%$) escape fractions, consistent with its small Ly$α$ velocity offset ($Δv\sim100$ km/s) and extremely blue UV-continuum slope ($β=-3.10$). These characteristics suggest that such UV-faint, metal-poor galaxies may contribute significantly to cosmic reionization. We also confirm five additional systems at the redshift of the Cosmic Archipelago, magnified by factors up to 12.5. They are all young (mass-weighted ages $<11$ Myr) and metal-poor ($Z<0.05$ Z$_\odot$), spanning a wide range of stellar masses and SFRs. Given the large number of these bursty star-forming galaxies in a small cosmic volume, we estimate that the currently known members of the Cosmic Archipelago result in a significant overdensity at $z\sim6$ ($Δz\sim0.08$), with $δ_{gal}=12.3^{+6.6}_{-4.6}$. These results highlight the Cosmic Archipelago as an unprecedented laboratory for studying the earliest groups of low-mass, low-metallicity galaxies during the epoch of reionization.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 宇宙群岛是一个由星系构成的集合，这些星系被星系团MACSJ0416强烈透镜，在红移$z\sim6.14$处展现出极端的物理性质。我们结合JWST/NIRCam与深度的VLT/X-Shooter和JWST/NIRSpec IFU，从远紫外到红光学静止参考系进行联合分光光度分析。我们重点关注CA4，这是一个紫外暗弱（$M_{UV}=-17.7$）、致密（$r_e=81\pm11$ pc）、位于$z=6.1446$的星系，被放大因子$μ=3.73$所放大。CA4是一个年轻、低质量（$M_\star =4.3\times10^6$ M$\odot$）、正在形成恒星（${\rm SFR}=0.46$ M$\odot$/yr）且金属贫乏（$Z\sim0.02$ Z$\odot$）的星系，并且是电离光子的高效生产者（$\log(ξ_{ion}/{\rm erg^{-1} Hz})\sim25.5$）。这些特性将CA4置于再电离时期大质量星团与矮星系之间鲜有探索的界面。此外，CA4显示出大的Ly$α$逃逸比例（$f_{esc}^{\rm Lyα}\sim43\%$）和莱曼连续谱逃逸比例（$f_{esc}\sim47\%$），与其小的Ly$α$速度偏移（$Δv\sim100$ km/s）和极蓝的紫外连续谱斜率（$β=-3.10$）一致。这些特征表明，此类紫外暗弱、金属贫乏的星系可能对宇宙再电离有重要贡献。我们还确认了宇宙群岛红移处的另外五个系统，它们被放大因子高达12.5。它们都很年轻（质量加权年龄$<11$ Myr）且金属贫乏（$Z<0.05$ Z$_\odot$），跨越了广泛的恒星质量和恒星形成率范围。鉴于在一个小的宇宙体积内存在大量这类爆发式恒星形成星系，我们估计目前已知的宇宙群岛成员在$z\sim6$（$Δz\sim0.08$）处导致了一个显著的超密度，其$δ_{gal}=12.3^{+6.6}_{-4.6}$。这些结果凸显了宇宙群岛作为一个前所未有的实验室，用于研究再电离时期最早的低质量、低金属星系群。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：紫外暗弱、金属贫乏的星系可能是宇宙再电离的重要贡献者，宇宙群岛系统为研究再电离时期最早的低质量、低金属星系群提供了前所未有的实验平台。

title: Baryonic mass budgets in the central regions of the Bullet Cluster and their consistency with strong lensing in MOND
comment: 23 pages, 10 figures. Accepted by PRD
summary: Strong lensing observations of the Bullet Cluster have traditionally been regarded as strong evidence for dark matter and a major challenge to Milgromian dynamics (MOND). The offset between the lensing mass and the X-ray gas centroids implies a substantial amount of unseen mass near the brightest cluster galaxies (BCGs). However, the high metallicities observed in both the intracluster gas and the massive early-type member galaxies suggest a past stellar population dominated by massive stars, whose evolved remnants contribute additional baryonic mass. This effect is naturally incorporated in the integrated galaxy-wide initial mass function (IGIMF) theory, which predicts substantially larger baryonic masses than a canonical IMF. In this work, we re-estimate the baryonic masses of the three BCG-centred core regions of the Bullet Cluster and compare them with MOND strong-lensing masses. We derive IGIMF masses using stellar population synthesis models with constant and (self-) enriched metallicities, representing lower and upper mass limits, respectively. We find that the MOND strong-lensing masses of all three cores lie within the range predicted by the IGIMF models. These results suggest that the baryonic mass budget inferred under the IGIMF framework is consistent with MOND requirements in the core regions of the Bullet Cluster. However, the physical viability of this scenario also depends on the spatial distribution and dynamical behavior of the remnant population, which remain to be established. More generally, regardless of the validity of MOND, the results imply that less dark matter may be required than previously inferred.

AI.tldr: 子弹头星团的强引力透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质的强证据和对MOND理论的挑战。本文利用IGIMF理论重新估计了星团核心区的重子质量，发现MOND强透镜质量落在IGIMF模型预测范围内，表明在IGIMF框架下重子质量预算与MOND要求一致，但剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为仍需验证。
AI.motivation: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测一直被视为暗物质存在的关键证据，同时对MOND理论构成重大挑战。作者希望检验MOND是否能在修正的重子质量估计下解释观测结果。
AI.method: 利用IGIMF理论，通过恒星族合成模型分别采用恒定金属丰度和自增丰金属丰度，对子弹头星团三个最亮星系团星系（BCG）核心区域的重子质量进行重新估计，并与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。
AI.result: 三个核心区域的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的质量范围内，表明IGIMF框架下的重子质量预算与MOND要求一致。
AI.conclusion: IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

recommendation.method_fit: 论文使用强透镜质量与IGIMF模型比较，方法上涉及透镜建模和恒星族合成，与用户常用的强透镜分析技术一致。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 子弹头星团的强透镜观测传统上被视为暗物质存在的有力证据，也是对米尔格罗姆动力学（MOND）的重大挑战。透镜质量与X射线气体质心之间的偏移表明，在 brightest 星团星系（BCGs）附近存在大量不可见质量。然而，在星团内气体和大型早型成员星系中观测到的高金属丰度表明，过去恒星群体以大质量恒星为主，其演化后的残骸贡献了额外的重子质量。这一效应自然地包含在集成星系初始质量函数（IGIMF）理论中，该理论预测的重子质量比标准IMF显著更大。在本工作中，我们重新估计了子弹头星团三个以BCG为中心的核心区域的重子质量，并将其与MOND强透镜质量进行比较。我们使用恒星种群合成模型推导IGIMF质量，分别采用恒定金属丰度和（自）富集金属丰度，代表质量下限和上限。我们发现，所有三个核心的MOND强透镜质量均落在IGIMF模型预测的范围内。这些结果表明，在IGIMF框架下推断的重子质量预算与子弹头星团核心区域的MOND要求一致。然而，这一情景的物理可行性还取决于残骸种群的空间分布和动力学行为，这仍有待确定。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，这些结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有总结：IGIMF理论可能使MOND在子弹头星团核心区与观测一致，但需进一步验证剩余物质的空间分布和动力学行为。更广泛而言，无论MOND是否成立，结果意味着所需暗物质可能少于先前推断。

title: Dust in the Average Galaxy: Attenuation, Emission, and Opacity from 0<z<7
comment: 50 pages, 21 figures; submitted to OJA. Table 1 provides measured empirical relations. Data tables available at https://github.com/caitlinmcasey/duststacks
summary: We present constraints on the dust emission and attenuation properties of galaxies across 0<z<7 using JWST imaging from the COSMOS-Web Survey combined with deep FIR/(sub)millimeter data from Spitzer, Herschel, SCUBA-2, NIKA-2 and ALMA. We analyze over 500,000 galaxies to independently constrain attenuation in the rest-frame UV/optical as well as dust emission from stacked FIR SEDs, enabling a direct comparison between the two. We find UV/optical attenuation systematically underpredicts IR luminosity by a factor of ~3x at 0.5<z<7 and up to an order of magnitude for $M_\star>10^{10.5}M_\odot$. We derive empirical relationships for the effective attenuation, dust temperature, fraction of star formation that is unobscured, and dust-to-stellar mass ratio as functions of redshift and stellar mass. We separate the first order effect of star/dust geometry from dust grain properties by combining constraints on the IR SED, UV SED, and dust mass surface density. Importantly, we measure over an order of magnitude decrease in $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$--the ratio of dust mass absorption coefficients in the UV at 1600Å and FIR at 500$μ$m--from z~0 to z~7. A depressed $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ is consistent with a deficit of small dust grains, possibly attributable to the intense radiation fields of high-$z$ star formation; indeed, we find a redshift-invariant inverse relationship between $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ and $Σ_{SFR}$. Most evolution in the dust-to-stellar ratio is at $z<1$, the product of mild downward evolution in the dust-to-gas ratio combined with steep evolution in the gas-to-stellar ratio. The significant evolution and dynamic range of $κ_{UV}/κ_{FIR}$ and prevailing disconnect between the UV/optical and FIR regimes emphasize that direct dust constraints are irreplaceable for the majority of star-forming galaxies at z<7, not just the most extreme star-formers.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST COSMOS-Web巡天结合多波段远红外/亚毫米数据，分析了超过50万个星系在0<z<7范围内的尘埃发射与消光特性。发现紫外/光学消光系统性地低估了红外光度约3倍（0.5<z<7），对大质量星系（M>10^10.5 M⊙）偏差可达一个数量级。测量到紫外与远红外尘埃吸收系数比（κ_UV/κ_FIR）从z~0到z~7下降了一个数量级以上，表明高红移星系中小尘埃颗粒缺失，可能与高恒星形成面密度产生的强烈辐射场有关。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用JWST的COSMOS-Web巡天成像数据，结合Spitzer、Herschel、SCUBA-2、NIKA-2和ALMA的远红外/亚毫米数据，给出了0<z<7范围内星系的尘埃辐射和消光特性约束。我们分析了超过50万个星系，独立约束了静止系紫外/光学消光以及通过叠加远红外能谱分布得到的尘埃辐射，从而能够直接比较两者。我们发现，在0.5<z<7范围内，紫外/光学消光系统性地低估了红外光度约3倍，对于M_⋆>10^10.5 M_⊙的星系，低估可达一个数量级。我们推导了有效消光、尘埃温度、未被遮蔽的恒星形成比例以及尘埃-恒星质量比随红移和恒星质量变化的经验关系。通过结合红外能谱分布、紫外能谱分布和尘埃质量面密度的约束，我们将恒星/尘埃几何结构的一阶效应与尘埃颗粒性质分离开来。重要的是，我们测量到κ_UV/κ_FIR（1600Å紫外和500μm远红外处的尘埃质量吸收系数之比）从z~0到z~7下降了一个数量级以上。κ_UV/κ_FIR的降低与小尘埃颗粒的缺失一致，这可能归因于高红移恒星形成的强辐射场；事实上，我们发现κ_UV/κ_FIR与Σ_SFR之间存在红移不变的负相关关系。尘埃-恒星比的大部分演化发生在z<1，这是尘埃-气体比温和下降与气体-恒星比急剧演变的共同结果。κ_UV/κ_FIR的显著演化和动态范围，以及紫外/光学与远红外区域之间的普遍脱节，表明直接尘埃约束对于z<7的大多数恒星形成星系（而不仅仅是最极端的恒星形成天体）是不可替代的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：高红移星系中κ_UV/κ_FIR的显著降低表明小尘埃颗粒的缺失，可能由强烈的恒星形成辐射场导致。直接尘埃约束对于z<7的大多数恒星形成星系是不可替代的，而不仅仅针对极端恒星形成天体。

title: Identification of Lensed Gravitational-Wave Beat Patterns by LISA
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, comments are welcome
summary: Strong lensing of massive black hole binaries can produce multiple gravitational-wave images with different magnifications and arrival times. LISA signals remain in band for months to years, allowing multiple lensed images to overlap during the inspiral stage and generate beat patterns. A singular isothermal sphere lens model is adopted to describe the lensing configuration, and two-image beat waveforms are constructed from massive black hole binary signals. To isolate the beat pattern itself, waveform mismatch is evaluated only during the overlapping inspiral stage before the coalescence of the first image, excluding contributions from the delayed merger peak of the second image. Using the HS-nod-SN (B+20) strong-lensing population, the occurrence rate of identifiable beat events is estimated, and Bayesian parameter estimation is performed with a beat template. Beat patterns are most readily identified when the lensing time delay is short and the delayed image has a relatively large magnification. Among 196 detectable two-image lensed events, 92 satisfy the temporal-overlap condition and 14 satisfy the beat-identification criterion, corresponding to an identifiable beat fraction of about 7\%. Posterior inference shows that the beat template can recover the lensing time delay and magnification parameters for a representative beat event. These results indicate that lensed beat patterns constitute a distinguishable subset of strongly lensed LISA events and provide a unique observational signature of strong lensing in the LISA band.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了LISA波段中大质量黑洞双星的强引力透镜效应，发现当透镜产生的时间延迟较短且后到像的放大率较大时，两幅引力波图像在并合前会重叠产生拍频模式。在196个可探测的双像透镜事件中，有14个满足拍频识别标准（约7%），且贝叶斯参数估计能有效恢复透镜参数。

title: Mock Catalogs of Strongly Lensed Gravitational Waves via a Halo Model Approach with Space-borne Detectors
comment: 18 pages, 13 figures, 10 tables
summary: Future space-borne gravitational-wave (GW) detectors, such as LISA and DECIGO, are expected to detect a large number of GW events, a fraction of which may be strongly lensed by intervening galaxies or galaxy clusters. In this work, we develop a comprehensive framework to simulate strongly lensed GWs in the context of space-borne detectors. Based on realistic astrophysical models for both the source population and the lens distribution, we construct mock catalogs of lensed GW events, referred to as \textbf{GW-LMC-Space}. Our results show that, for a four-year LISA observation, the expected number of lensed events ranges from $0$ to $131$, depending on the adopted formation model of massive black hole binaries (MBHBs). The corresponding lensing probability for MBHBs can reach up to $\sim 0.3\%$. For DECIGO, we find that the number of lensed events in a one-year observation is expected to lie in the range of $0$--$44$, with a lensing probability of $\sim 0.15\%$ for stellar-mass binary black holes (BBHs), binary neutron stars (BNSs), and neutron star--black hole binaries (NSBHs). We further show that the overlap of lensed signals is a common feature in space-borne detectors, which can significantly affect both the signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) estimation and event identification. These results highlight the importance of accounting for signal overlap in the analysis of strongly lensed GW events in future space-borne GW observations.
